creator: andy.lavr@gmail.com
text:
Hi!

 Attached is a shar file for mysql-workbench-5.2.47.
This new port (databases/mysql-workbench) is intended to supersede
mysql-workbench51 and mysql-workbench52.

A few notes:
- It works with MySQL 5.5/5.6
- It will compile with Clang

Works fine with my system:

 FreeBSD 59.informalians.local 10.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT #0
r247906M(clang-r170710):
Thu Mar  7 11:15:45 EET 2013
root@59.informalians.local:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/Kernel  amd64



---
Best regards, Andrei Lavreniyuk.
